steps.summary: Created docs/reports/field-feedback/2026-07-05-demo-brief.md. The brief updates the 10-minute flow around current demo outputs, including review-pack external evidence panels, statement-candidates Evidence column, evidence-boundary.md, audit analytics linkage, and explicit human-review/non-substitution boundaries.

Created docs/reports/field-feedback/2026-07-05-feedback-questionnaire.md. The questionnaire collects score and narrative feedback across accuracy/evidence, usefulness, review burden, risk/control, and next PoC candidates, with explicit questions about evidence boundary and synthetic fact risk.

Created docs/reports/field-feedback/2026-07-05-known-limitations.md. It separates data/copyright boundary, judgment responsibility, external evidence boundary, synthetic fact boundary, audit analytics boundary, and next-PoC questions, emphasizing that accountant review remains required.

Closed field feedback package with docs/reports/field-feedback/INDEX.md and docs/reports/2026-07-05-ff4-feedback-package-close-report.md. The package links the refreshed demo brief, questionnaire, known limitations, demo bundle, evidence boundary, and statement candidates; close gate passed demo regeneration, focused tests, quality_preflight, and diff check.
